prompt: I need the Infisical Agent to render both static secrets AND dynamic PostgreSQL credentials into a config file. The dynamic credentials should auto-renew before they expire. Show me how to write the template.
assertions: Template uses listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug for static secrets
Template uses dynamicSecret function for PostgreSQL credentials
dynamicSecret function has correct 5-arg signature (project-slug, env, path, name, ttl)
Shows .DB_USERNAME and .DB_PASSWORD fields from dynamic secret output
Mentions auto-renewal behavior (agent renews before expiration)
